'''鈭歴h-ch-j-zh''' ('''kashachjezhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:charter|charter]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-ch-j-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:charter|charter]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴h-ch-j-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kashachjezhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishachjezhoko|thishachjezhoko]] || [[word:jishachjezhoko|jishachjezhoko]] || [[word:shishachjezhoko|shishachjezhoko]] || [[word:kishachjezhoko|kishachjezhoko]]

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
